title: fagelia dentata
intro: Fagelia dentata, also known as the toothed fagelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Fagelia dentata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Fagelia dentata typically involve the leaves being made into a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
